description_long: This is a set of five elegant wooden tables, each with a semi-circular or demilune shape and slender, tapered legs. The tables are designed to nest together, forming a circular arrangement when combined, or to be used individually as half-moon consoles. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish with a subtle sheen, and the craftsmanship suggests a classic or vintage style, possibly inspired by Georgian or Regency furniture. The tabletops are smooth and slightly beveled at the edges, with no visible drawers or hardware. Decorative banding or inlay is visible along the apron, adding a refined touch to the otherwise minimalist design. These tables would be suitable for use in public lobbies, parks, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A set of five semi-circular wooden tables with tapered legs and decorative banding, designed to nest together or be used separately. The tables have a warm brown finish and a classic, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five tables arranged in a semi-circle, highlighting their matching design and decorative aprons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the tables and how they nest together to form a circular arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the straight backs of the tables and the uniformity of their construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the alignment and spacing between the tables when arranged in a group.
